get.description:
List collaborators of a file. Only `doc` or `data table` files are supported.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_collaborator:read`,`docs_collaborator:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read:list_file_collaborators`,`docs:read:list_file_collaborators:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `MEDIUM`

200.description: Returns the collaborators of a file.

collaborators.description: A list of collaborators. Each collaborator item must contain exactly one of the following fields: `user_id`, `channel_id`, or `email`.

collaborator_id.description: The collaborator item ID, used as the `collaboratorId` when removing or modifying a collaborator.

user_id.description: The Zoom user ID. Available when `collaborator_type` = `user`.

channel_id.description: The Zoom Team Chat channel ID. Available when `collaborator_type` = `channel`.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Share a file with newly added Zoom users or Zoom Team Chat channels. Only `doc` or `data table` files are supported.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_collaborator:write`,`docs_collaborator:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write:collaborator`,`docs:write:collaborator:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `MEDIUM`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of a file in Docs.

collaborators.description: A list of collaborators to be added. Each collaborator item must contain exactly one of the following fields: `user_id`, `channel_id` and `email`.

201.description: Returns the collaborators successfully added to collaborator list of this file.

collaborators.description: Collaborators successfully added to collaborator list of this file. Each collaborator item must contain exactly one of the following fields: `user_id`, `channel_id`, or `email`.

collaborator_id.description: The collaborator item ID, used as the `collaboratorId` when removing or modifying a collaborator.

user_id.description: The Zoom user ID. Available when `collaborator_type` = `user`.

channel_id.description: The Zoom Team Chat channel ID. Available when `collaborator_type` = `channel`.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found File not found.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.description:
Creates a export for specified file.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_export:write`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write:export`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `HEAVY`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

export_format.description:
The target format for export.

Different file types support different export formats:

- `doc` supports export to `docx`, `markdown` or `pdf`
- `data_table` supports export to `csv`

201.description: A Docs file is being converted into expected format.

export_id.description: The unique ID for your export. Use this ID to check the export status via the Get file export status endpoint (GET /docs/exports/{exportId}/status).

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.description:
Use this API to query the status of a file export. 

Before using this API, confirm that you have invoked the API Create a file export endpoint and obtained the `export_id`.

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read:export`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

parameters.name: exportId
parameters.description: The unique ID for your export.

200.description: Retrieves the docs file export result.

status.description:
The status of the file export.

Enum:
- `processing` - The Docs file is being converted.
- `succeeded` - The Docs file has been converted successfully.
- `failed` - The Docs file has failed to convert.

download_link.description: The download link for the converted file. This field will be returned when the value of status is `succeeded`.

expires_at.description:
The expiration date of the `download_link` URL; after this time, the `download_link` will become invalid.

This field will be returned when the value of status is `succeeded`.

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request **Error Code:** `5150`
Export file size limit exceeded.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found **Error Code:** `5003`
The exportId not exists or expired.

post.description:
Creates a new file for a user.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write`,`docs:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write:file`,`docs:write:file:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `MEDIUM`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent file. The newly created file will become a child of this parent. If this parameter is omitted, the file will be placed under "My Docs." Use "root" to represent the top-level folder of the current user. Folders can only be created under "My Docs," a shared folder, or another folder.

user_id.description: When invoked with the `admin` scope, this operation runs on behalf of the specified user. Permissions are validated against that user. This parameter is required with the `admin` scope and has no effect otherwise.

schema.description: Create a new file request body.

201.description: Returns the ID of the created file.

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request Invalid request parameters provided.

403.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `403`
Forbidden Permission required to create files under this parent directory.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found File not found.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.summary: List all children of a file
get.description:
List all children of a file.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read`,`docs:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read:list_children`,`docs:read:list_children:admin`

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The fileId of a file. When querying children of 'My docs', `fileId` should be `root`.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: The next page token paginates through a large set of results. A next page token returns whenever the set of available results exceeds the current page size. The expiration period for this token is 15 minutes.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of shared folders to query. The maximum size is 50.

file_link.description: The access link of a file.

created_time.description: The time when the file created.

modified_time.description: The time when the file last modified.

next_page_token.description: The next page token paginates through a large set of results. A next page token returns whenever the set of available results exceeds the current page size. The expiration period for this token is 15 minutes.

Not Found Parent not found.

post.summary: Create file upload for docs import or attachments
post.description:
Create a file upload for document import or attachments.

Notes:
- Base URL: https://fileapi.zoom.us/v2.
- Rate limit: 20 requests per second per user or 2000 requests per second per IP address.
- The caller must retain the Authorization header when redirected to a different hostname.
- Unsupported file formats: `.svg`.
- For an account-level [OAuth](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/create/) app, this API can only be used on behalf of a user who is assigned with a [role](https://support.zoom.com/hc/en/article?id=zm_kb&sysparm_article=KB0064983#h_80abad9b-86a8-492c-8a3b-5b0141a8c0a9) with Edit permission for Docs Management.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_file_uploads:write`,`docs_file_uploads:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write:file_uploads`,`docs:write:file_uploads:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `HEAVY`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

file.description: The data file to be uploaded.

file_upload_id.description: The unique ID of the file upload.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

get.summary: Get the general access setting of a file
get.description:
Get the general access settings of a file. Only `doc` or `data table` files are supported.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_general_access:read`,`docs_general_access:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read:general_access`,`docs:read:general_access:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `MEDIUM`

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of a file in Docs.

200.description: Return the general access setting of a file.

share_scope.description:
The general access scope of this file.
`collaborators_only`: only collaborators of this file can access
`anyone_in_org`: users within the same orgnization as the file owner can access
`anyone_with_link`: anyone can access this file, including anonymous user.

role.description: Role to collaborate. This field is empty when `share_scope` is set to `collaborators_only`.

general_access_setting.description: The general access setting of this file.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

patch.summary: Modify the general access setting of a file
patch.description:
Modify the general access setting for a file. Only `doc` or `data table` files are supported.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_general_access:write`,`docs_general_access:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:update:general_access`,`docs:update:general_access:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `MEDIUM`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

parameters.name: fileId
parameters.description: The ID of a file in Docs.

share_scope.description:
The general access scope of this file.
`collaborators_only`: only collaborators of this file can access
`anyone_in_org`: users within the same orgnization as the file owner can access
`anyone_with_link`: anyone can access this file, including anonymous user.

role.description: Role to collaborate. This field is empty when `share_scope` is set to `collaborators_only`.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found File not found.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).

post.summary: Create a new file by import
post.description:
Creates a new file from a file upload.

**When importing the uploaded file as a specified type of Docs file:**
- `doc`
  - Upload file size limit is 10MB.
  - The size limit for a single Block's content is 1MB.
  - Maximum number of Blocks allowed is 20,000.
- `data_table`
  - Upload file size limit is 10MB.
  - Maximum number of columns allowed in a single data table is 200.
  - The size limit for a single Block's content is 1MB.
  - Maximum number of Blocks allowed in a single data table is 20,000.

**When importing an HTML compressed package exported from Notion into Docs:**
  - Maximum allowed size for a single zip archive is 4GB.
  - Maximum number of files that can be imported into Docs within a single ZIP file is 100,000.
  - The maximum depth of parent-child relationships between files in the tree structure is 20.
  - Maximum number of child nodes allowed per node in the tree is 2,000.



**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_import:write`,`docs_import:write:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:write:import`,`docs:write:import:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `HEAVY`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

file_type.description: The type of the file created after import.

parent_id.description: The ID of the parent file. The newly created file will become a child of this parent. If this parameter is omitted, the file will be placed under **My Docs**. Use `root` to represent the top-level folder of the current user. Folders can only be created under **My Docs**, a shared folder, or another folder.

file_upload_id.description: The ID of the file upload. Ensure the file is valid, within the size limit, and in a supported format.

file_upload_type.description: The supported file format for upload. For file type `doc`, the supported formats are `.docx`, `.txt`, `.html` and `.md`. For file type `data_table`, the supported formats are `.xlsx` and `.csv`. For the zip file in HTML format exported from Notion, use `notion_zip`.

user_id.description: When invoked with the `admin` scope, this operation runs on behalf of the specified user. Permissions are validated against that user. This parameter is required with the `admin` scope and has no effect otherwise.

201.description: The uploaded file is being converted into a Docs file.

import_id.description: The unique ID for your import. Use this ID to check the import status via the **Get file import status** endpoint (GET /docs/imports/{importId}/status).

400.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `400`
Bad Request **Error Code:** `5004`
File size limit exceeded.
**Error Code:** `5005`
Incorrect file format.
**Error Code:** `20001`
Invalid `user_id` for `admin` scope.
**Error Code:** `20002`
`parent_id` file not found.
**Error Code:** `20003`
Invalid `file_type`.

403.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `403`
Forbidden Permission is needed to create children under this file.

404.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `404`
Not Found **Error Code:** `5007`
File upload does not exist.

get.description:
Use this API to query the status of a new file by import. Before using this API, confirm that you have invoked the API **Create a new file by import** endpoint and obtained the `import_id`.

**[Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs_import:read`,`docs_import:read:admin`

**[Granular Scopes](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/integrations/oauth-scopes-overview/):** `docs:read:import`,`docs:read:import:admin`

**[Rate Limit Label](https://marketplace.zoom.us/docs/api-reference/rate-limits#rate-limits):** `LIGHT`

**Not supported in Gov cluster**

parameters.name: importId
parameters.description: The unique ID for your import.

200.description: Retrieves the docs file import result.

status.description:
The status of the file created by importing an uploaded file.

Enum:
`processing` - The uploaded file is being converted.
`succeeded` - The uploaded file has been converted successfully.
`failed` - The uploaded file has failed to convert.

file_id.description:
The file ID is `nullable`. This value is returned only when the status is `succeeded`.

The zip file in HTML format exported from Notion may contain data for one or more files; importing will only return the root ID of the imported files.

file_type.description: The type of the created file.

429.description:
**HTTP Status Code:** `429`
Too Many Requests. For more information, see [rate limits](https://developers.zoom.us/docs/api/rate-limits/).
